CE1.justification: Acted on its own — inspected directory, surfaced missing file, gave two concrete unblocks without asking the user to fetch context.

CE2.justification: Mostly tight, but the quoted runbook line ('If a prior artifact is missing…') is internal-discipline restatement the user doesn't need.

CE3.justification: Named the precise path, said it is step 3's artifact, and said why step 4 can't read it — all in one clause.

CE4.justification: No artifacts written; explicitly chose not to log anything until user direction. Clean interruption surface.
